creator: kristinacors
caption: Fun fact: I grew up going to Virginia Beach almost every summer and it’s still one of those places that somehow pulls you back again and again. Here are 5 things you have to do if you’re in Virginia Beach this summer (save this for your trip). And if you want the official Virginia Beach weekend guide created in partnership with the tourism board, comment “BEACH” and I’ll send it to you! #ad #visitvabeach #travel #virginiabeach #thingstodoinvirginiabeach @visitvabeach

transcription.text: Five things you have to do in Virginia Beach. This spot has everything for entertainment. It has a ropes course, bumper cars that light up, you can go bowling, there's virtual reality, you can play golf, go axe throwing, go to the arcade, and more. This spot is called Apex. If you're looking for a scenic, relaxing vibe by the beach where you can play a little cornhole, make sure to stop by Tulum. Seriously, rain or shine, it's stunning. Okay, this place is great whether you're a party of two or 10. You can play golf, they serve food, and the experts love it, but don't worry, if you're a beginner like me, you'll still have a lot of fun. It's called Topgolf. Next, if you want some really good food and you wanna check out a spot the locals recommend, then definitely head to this restaurant for some comfort food. My cousins live here and they're obsessed with this spot. It is called Commune. And last but not least, if you want some gorgeous rooftop views of Virginia Beach this summer, you have to come here. I'll tell you the name in a second, but first, if you want a free Virginia Beach weekend guide from the tourism board, come at beach and I'll send it to you. The name of this spot is Orion's Rooftop. Follow for more things to do in Virginia Beach and around the world.
